register_name: List of accredited researchers and research projects under the research strand of the Digital Economy Act
public_access_status: Publicly downloadable source register; an explicit licence statement is not recorded in the repository.
notes: data/register_manifest.json identifies version 20260601 as current and records the source URL, retrieval date and 1450-row count.

The register manifest hash is the canonical LF-normalised Git blob. The protected Windows working-tree hash records the byte-identical CSV content with CRLF line endings; replacing CRLF with LF reproduces the Git-blob hash exactly.
The raw source was not modified during Record-ID normalisation or Phase 3 packaging.
A deterministic in-memory rerun of the cleaning pipeline reproduced the frozen cleaned CSV exactly.
